title: Detailed Impact Report
subtitle: A comprehensive breakdown of how your contributions are providing essential support, relief, and reconstruction across Ukraine.
militaryAidDesc: Direct assistance to military personnel: equipment, technology, and protection.
humanitarianAidDesc: Assistance to civilians: food, medicine, and basic necessities.
otherOrgsDesc: Collaboration with other volunteer groups for joint relief efforts.
otherTitleDesc: Various expenses, logistics, and urgent matters not falling under fixed categories.
contributionsDesc: A transparent view of where our funds are actively deployed.
togetherDesc: Our mission is far from over. Join thousands of others in rebuilding Ukraine and providing life-saving support where it's needed most.
cancellationTerms: There is no binding period, and if you wish to stop your regular deduction agreement, please contact us at phone +47 912 54 807 or email mrija.i.drammen@gmail.com
